title: Clean Create
description: An optimized vanilla + create mod experience. Have fun with friends through proximity chat and quality of life add-ons
body:
Clean Create was originally created for a family server with players ranging from new-to-minecraft 6 year olds to grindy vets. This modpack has room for casual play and and challenging adventure. Clean create mirrors vanilla gameplay with quality of life changes and tech introduced by the create mod.


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

### Performance
- Clean Create is built on [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), the fastest and most efficient optimization configuration for minecraft
- Runs smooth and fast, 100+ fps with decade old hardware

### Quality of life changes such as:
- gravestone mod: stores items in a gravestone on death
- moving in inventory
- recipe viewer (EMI)
- player icon locator on experience bar
  
### Slight visual changes
- weapons and tools rendered on players
- connected textures, better grass
- included shader (that can even run on integrated graphics!) and support for more

### Exploration
- almost all structures overhauled
- challenging dungeons from When Dungeons Arise

### Improved Audio
- new sounds
- sound physics (reverb and muffling)
- voice chat with Plasmo Voice
- voice chat will set off sculk sensors and interacts with sound physics (hear your voice echo in caves)

### Tech
- Create mod introduces mechanisms and automation to learn
- Create mod adds a substantial amount of content, some structures will generate with create contraptions (look in the nether!) 
</details>


<details>
<summary>Server</summary>
To set up a dedicated server, paste the "mods" folder and "config" folder in the server folder.

To open a local game to multiplayer, I suggest [World Host](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-host) mod

Make sure that UDP port (25565 by default) is open for the Plasmo Voice mod. See [here](https://plasmovoice.com/docs/server/installing/) for voice chat server setup. I suggest setting voice proximity distance to 100 in the Plasmo Voice server config.

</details>
